resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def repeatedCharacter(self, s: str) -> str:
        seen = set()
        for ch in s:
            if ch in seen:
                return ch
            seen.add(ch)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Single pass through the string while tracking seen characters with a fixed-size set (26 letters max). Returns immediately upon the second occurrence of any character, ensuring minimal work.
